batch_5_linkedin_strategy.status: READY — templates and rules prepared. Awaiting Batch 5 Ryedale data. CRITICAL: 32-day campaign gap since last initial send (2026-03-28).
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.confirmed_winner_sectors: SSL leads with full names — 3/3 INTERESTED leads used SSL+PAS+first-name-subject. Prioritise high-LinkedIn sectors: solicitors, estate agents, B&Bs, restaurants, care providers.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.first_name_only_rule: Skip LinkedIn if first name only AND low-LinkedIn trade (electrician, plumber, roofer, joiner, builder). Attempt if first name only AND high-LinkedIn sector (care, leisure, solicitor, accountant, restaurant owner).
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.post_reference_priority: HANDS: check each profile for recent posts (60 days) BEFORE sending any note. post_reference achieves 3-4x higher acceptance rate. Execute search, post-check, and send in ONE SESSION on Day 3-6.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.window: Day 3 to Day 6 inclusive after initial email. This is a narrow window — execution must happen same-session.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.mandatory_same_session_protocol: BRAIN will flag Day 3 LinkedIn send day explicitly in daily_signals.json as a MANDATORY action item. HANDS must complete in under 2 hours of BRAIN run. Write linkedin_profiles.json immediately after each session.
batch_5_linkedin_strategy.weekend_rule: If Day 3-6 falls on Saturday or Sunday: hold to Monday morning. Exception: if Day 6 is Sunday and Day 7 fires Monday — send Sunday 18:00+.
